_doc: Hand-curated expected Stage 3 pre-mortem verdict for the AXS-05 fixture, paired with stage_2_hypothesis_expected.json. The bear hypothesis (H3) is expected to be 'weakened' (CRL is plausible but the convergent positive trial data narrows it) rather than 'falsified' — pre-mortem captures the residual tail risk. Overall verdict 'partial' is the expected shape. Short ids match the hex shorts in stage_2_hypothesis_expected.json so Stage 7's CITE_FACT_RE resolves them.

failure_modes.description: Late-cycle FDA AdComm could raise unanticipated safety concerns specific to the geriatric ADA population.
CMC inspection issue at the contract manufacturer could trigger a CRL despite efficacy data.

disconfirming_searches: FDA OND late-cycle meeting minutes for AXS-05 (NDA #218016)
Axsome contract manufacturer FDA inspection history 2024-2026
update_triggers: Axsome 8-K disclosure of late-cycle FDA correspondence

failure_modes.description: Existing class-level boxed warning on bupropion may already cover the suicidality risk without further label restriction.

disconfirming_searches: FDA approved labels for first-in-indication agitation drugs over last decade

failure_modes.description: Two convergent positive Phase 3 trials reduce CRL probability below the 22% reference-class base rate for novel-indication neuropsych submissions.
Breakthrough Therapy Designation pre-application history suggests FDA-Axsome alignment on key review issues.

disconfirming_searches: FDA late-cycle safety signal review for AXS-05
CMAI endpoint validation history for FDA registration
update_triggers: Axsome 10-K disclosure of FDA review division feedback
